description: payment-service leaks JVM heap space over time, triggering Kubernetes OOMKilled pod reboot

values: Critical warnings: JVM heap consumption exceeded 95% of active allocation (512MB)
Warning: Garbage Collection spending >98% CPU executing gc sweeps
Exception in thread 'http-nio-8080-exec-4' java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space
Exception in thread 'http-nio-8080-exec-5' java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space
FATAL: JVM has encountered an unrecoverable out of memory exception. Shutting down...
INFO: Spring Boot framework version 3.2.1 starting up on payment-service-89f92-2x9wl
INFO: Service payment-service loaded active profile: production, binding port 8080

annotations.summary: payment-service container restarts in Kubernetes have exceeded normal thresholds.
annotations.description: Pod payment-service-89f92-2x9wl container rebooted unexpectedly. Reason: OOMKilled (Exit Code 137).
